trans-unit.source: The update is in progress! Do you really want to abort?

context-group.context: Id: PLSID_ABORT_OPERATION Shown in message box when the user presses the abort button. Group: Texts used by the game patcher.

trans-unit.source: Updating files... It could take some time.
trans-unit.target: 파일을 업데이트하는 중... 시간이 좀 걸릴 수 있습니다

context-group.context: Id: PLSID_PATCHING Shown while the patch is applying the change. Group: Texts used by the game patcher.

trans-unit.source: You do not have the appropriate privileges on this system. Log on as an administrator and then run this update again.
trans-unit.target: 현재 시스템에 적절한 권한이 없습니다. 관리자로 로그온 한 뒤 다시 업데이트를 진행하십시오.

context-group.context: Id: PLSID_ADMIN_ACCESS Shown if the user running this patch does not have the rights necessary to modify the files. Group: Texts used by the game patcher.

trans-unit.source: Data integrity check...

context-group.context: Id: PLSID_DATA_CHECK Shown while the patch is checking that the installer file is not damaged. Group: Texts used by the game patcher.

trans-unit.source: The game files were not modified. You can apply this update again after fixing the issue.
trans-unit.target: 게임 파일이 수정되지 않았습니다. 문제를 해결 한 뒤에 다시 업데이트를 적용할 수 있습니다.

context-group.context: Id: PLSID_UNMODIFIED Appended to various error messages if the error did not cause damage to the existing installation of the game. Group: Texts used by the game patcher.

trans-unit.source: Retry

context-group.context: Id: PLSID_RETRY Title of button which will retry the operation. Currently the only operation supporting this is the free space check. Group: Texts used by the game patcher.

trans-unit.source: This program will update the game to version $VERSION$

context-group.context: Id: PLSID_WELCOME Shown on the first page of the of the patch. Group: Texts used by the game patcher.

trans-unit.source: Unable to create file!

context-group.context: Id: PLSID_CREATE_FAILED Shown when the patch was unable to create a file. Group: Texts used by the game patcher.

trans-unit.source: Unable to open file!

context-group.context: Id: PLSID_OPEN_FAILED Shown when the patch was unable to open a file. Group: Texts used by the game patcher.

trans-unit.source: Unable to read file!

context-group.context: Id: PLSID_READ_FAILED Shown when there was problem while reading from file. Group: Texts used by the game patcher.

trans-unit.source: Data integrity check failed. The update file is damaged or incomplete, possibly due to an aborted download.
trans-unit.target: 데이터 무결성 확인 실패. 업데이트가 손상되었거나, 불안전합니다.

context-group.context: Id: PLSID_INST_CORRUPTED Shown if the patch executable is damaged. Group: Texts used by the game patcher.

trans-unit.note: The currently approved translation is not correct, please review my translation: "Проверката за целостта на данните е неуспешна. Обновяващият файл е повреден или непълен, вероятно в резултат на прекъснато изтегляне."
@RacerBG Well noted. I've marked it as approved, have to check all the lines involving the "download" word to make sure everything is in sync. Thanks.

trans-unit.source: Unable to write file! The disk is full?
trans-unit.target: 파일을 쓸 수 없습니다! 디스크 용량이 부족합니다.

context-group.context: Id: PLSID_WRITE_FAILED Shown when there was problem while writing to file. Group: Texts used by the game patcher.

trans-unit.source: Update

context-group.context: Id: PLSID_MSGBOX_TITLE Used as title of various message boxes Group: Texts used by the game patcher.

trans-unit.note: Is it plural or singular? Can you please provide a screenshot?

trans-unit.source: Ensure that you've got sufficient rights to access the game files. If there's an anti-virus solution, suspend it while applying this update.
trans-unit.target: 이 게임 파일에 액세스할 수 있는 권한이 있는지 확인합니다. 안티 바이러스 솔루션(백신)이 있다면 업데이트를 하는 동안 일시 정지해주시기 바랍니다.

context-group.context: Id: PLSID_RIGHTS_OR_AV Shown on error screens which might be caused by insufficient rights of the user running the patch or by interference of some aggressive anti-virus program. Group: Texts used by the game patcher.

trans-unit.source: Unsupported game version! This update does not support this version of the game, or the game files are corrupted.
trans-unit.target: 지원되지 않는 게임 버전입니다! 이 업데이트는 이 버전을 지원을 하지 않거나, 혹은 게임 파일이 손상되었습니다.

context-group.context: Id: PLSID_WRONG_VERSION Shown if the version found by the patch contains at least one file whose version is not known to the patch. Group: Texts used by the game patcher.

trans-unit.source: Update

context-group.context: Id: PLSID_TITLE Used in title of the main window in the following form "GAMENAME - Update VERSION" i.e. "Euro Truck Simulator 2 - Update 1.2.14" Group: Texts used by the game patcher.

trans-unit.source: Continue Anyway

context-group.context: Id: PLSID_CONTINUE_ANYWAY Title of button which allows the user to ignore warning message. Group: Texts used by the game patcher.

trans-unit.source: Unable to move or delete file!

context-group.context: Id: PLSID_FILE_ACCESS_ERROR Shown when there was problem while moving or deleting file. Group: Texts used by the game patcher.

trans-unit.note: The current approved translation is not correct, please review my translation: "Non se puido mover ou eliminar o ficheiro!"
Is it about many or a single file?

trans-unit.source: Continue

context-group.context: Id: PLSID_CONTINUE Title of button which continues to next step of the patching. Group: Texts used by the game patcher.

trans-unit.source: The game is already up to date.

context-group.context: Id: PLSID_GAME_UP_TO_DATE Shown if the patch determines that the game is already patched. Group: Texts used by the game patcher.

trans-unit.note: לפי כללי האקדמיה ללשון העברית, יש לכתוב ה' במקום א' בכל המילים שמקורן מארמית כגון דוגמה, קופסא וכדומה

trans-unit.source: Abort

context-group.context: Id: PLSID_ABORT Title of button which aborts currently running operation. Group: Texts used by the game patcher.

trans-unit.source: More information about this issue might be available in the log found in $LOGFILE$
trans-unit.target: 이 문제에 대한 자세한 내용은 $LOGFILE$에 있는 로그를 이용할 수 있습니다.

context-group.context: Id: PLSID_MORE_INFO Show on all relevant error screens. Group: Texts used by the game patcher.

trans-unit.note: The currently approved translation is not correct, please review my translation: "Повече информация относно този проблем може да откриете във файла в $LOGFILE$"

trans-unit.source: The game installation is corrupted. You need to reinstall the game before running this update again.
trans-unit.target: 게임이 손상된 상태입니다. 업데이트를 하기 전에 재설치를 해주시길 바랍니다.

context-group.context: Id: PLSID_GAME_CORRUPTED Appended to various error messages if the error did likely cause damage to the existing installation of the game. Group: Texts used by the game patcher.

trans-unit.note: The currently approved translation is not correct, please review my translation: "Инсталацията на играта е повредена. Трябва да преинсталирате играта, преди да стартирате тази актуализация отново."
@RacerBG This one slipped under the rug :D

trans-unit.source: Game not found! It is possible that it hasn't installed properly or some important files are missing. Try to copy this update to the directory where the game is installed (it should contain base.scs file) and run it from there.
trans-unit.target: 게임을 찾을 수 없습니다! 제대로 설치되지 않았거나, 일부 중요한 파일이 누락되어 있을 수 있습니다. 게임이 설치되어있는 디렉토리(base.scs 파일이 포함되어 있어야 합니다)에 업데이트 파일을 복사하여 실행해보세요.

context-group.context: Id: PLSID_NOT_FOUND Shown if the patch can not find existing installation of the game. Group: Texts used by the game patcher.

trans-unit.source: The update is not finished! Do you really want to exit?

context-group.context: Id: PLSID_EXIT_OPERATION Shown when user attempts to exit the first page of the patch. Group: Texts used by the game patcher.

trans-unit.source: Warning: There is insufficient free space on the target disk, at least $SPACE$ MB is required. Do you want to continue anyway?
trans-unit.target: 경고: 이 대상 디스크에 적어도 $SPACE$ MB 정도의 충분한 여유 공간이 필요합니다. 계속 진행 하시겠습니까?

context-group.context: Id: PLSID_FREE_SPACE Shown if the patch thinks that there is a insufficient space on the disk containing the game installation. Group: Texts used by the game patcher.

trans-unit.source: Steam version of the game is not supported by this update! Steam will automatically update the game unless automatic updates are disabled.
trans-unit.target: 게임의 스팀 버전이 업데이트를 지원하지 않습니다! 자동 업데이트를 사용하지 않는 한 스팀이 자동으로 게임을 업데이트합니다

context-group.context: Id: PLSID_NO_STEAM Used as title of various message boxes Group: Texts used by the game patcher.

trans-unit.source: Checking file conditions...

context-group.context: Id: PLSID_ANALYZE Shown while the patch is checking the existing game files to determine if the patch can be applied. Group: Texts used by the game patcher.

trans-unit.source: Exit

context-group.context: Id: PLSID_EXIT Title of button which exits the patch. Group: Texts used by the game patcher.

trans-unit.source: Another instance of the game or this updater is already running...
trans-unit.target: 다른 게임의 업데이트가 이미 진행 중입니다...

context-group.context: Id: PLSID_APP_RUNNING Shown of the patch is launched while the game or the patch itself is already running. Group: Texts used by the game patcher.

trans-unit.source: Update was aborted on user request. The game files were not modified.
trans-unit.target: 유저 요청에 의해 업데이트가 중단되었습니다. 게임은 변경되지 않습니다

context-group.context: Id: PLSID_INST_ABORTED Shown after user aborts the patching operation by press of the Abort button. Group: Texts used by the game patcher.

trans-unit.source: The game update was successfully finished.

context-group.context: Id: PLSID_UPDATE_FINISHED Shown after the patch completes update of the game. Group: Texts used by the game patcher.

trans-unit.source: English

context-group.context: Id: PLSID_LANG Name of the language, put your native language name here in your native language Group: Texts used by the game patcher.

trans-unit.note: לפי הקונטקסט שהובא, שם השפה אמור להכתב בשפת המקור, ועל כן, אין לתרגם מחרוזת זו!

trans-unit.source: Internal error!

context-group.context: Id: PLSID_INTERNAL_ERR Indicates that the patch encountered a unexpected error. Group: Texts used by the game patcher.
